summary: Comprehensive testing of new 9xCodes features: Popular articles, Related articles, Bookmarks (localStorage), Tag filtering, Copy button visibility, and Table of Contents. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

issues: Clipboard API error shown in overlay when clicking Copy on code blocks - browser permission issue in test environment, not a real bug

backend.popular_endpoint: PASS - Returns snippets sorted by views descending
backend.related_endpoint: PASS - Returns related articles excluding original
backend.tag_filter: PASS - Filters snippets by tag via ?tag= parameter
backend.sorting: PASS - Sort by views, popular, recent all working

frontend.most_popular_section: PASS - Shows 6 popular articles with view counts (49k+ views)
frontend.bookmarks_toggle: PASS - Saved Articles button shows count, filters when clicked
frontend.bookmark_on_cards: PASS - Bookmark icon on article cards, amber when saved
frontend.tag_clicking_homepage: PASS - Clicking tag adds ?tag= param and shows filter banner
frontend.clear_tag_filter: PASS - Clear filter link removes tag filter
frontend.copy_button_visible: PASS - Copy button always visible (not hover-only)
frontend.toc_desktop: PASS - Table of Contents sidebar shows for articles with 3+ steps
frontend.toc_mobile: PASS - Mobile TOC card shows on smaller screens
frontend.related_articles: PASS - Related Articles section at bottom of detail page
frontend.bookmark_detail_page: PASS - Save button on detail page works with localStorage
frontend.reading_time: PASS - Shows estimated reading time (X min read)
frontend.tag_links_detail: PASS - Tag links navigate to homepage with ?tag= filter

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 237 articles in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Popular articles, Related articles, Bookmarks, Tag filtering, Copy button, TOC) fully tested and working. Backend has /api/snippets/popular and /api/snippets/{slug}/related endpoints. Bookmarks use localStorage key '9xcodes_bookmarks'. TOC only shows for articles with 3+ steps. Tag filtering uses URL param ?tag=xxx.
